title: Migrate doc-build call-sites to compass --direct (retain vcpkg bypass)
description: Migrate the doc/agile build call-sites that have a compass equivalent to use compass build --direct so the site build pipeline is consistent and the vcpkg bypass flag is preserved.
blurb: Switch all direct compass build invocations to use the --direct flag so the site rebuild pipeline is uniform.
body_excerpt: The existing Makefile targets invoke compass build without --direct, bypassing the vcpkg path resolution. Migrate each call-site to compass build --direct. Verify the site rebuilds correctly end-to-end after the migration.
